instruction: Check whether the AetherBrowser CDP lane is ready before using a logged-in browser session
action_sequence: inspect agents/aetherbrowse_cli.py for CDP readiness behavior
query local CDP endpoint expectations at 127.0.0.1:9222
if unavailable, return an actionable readiness message instead of a traceback
fall back to playwriter or repo-local evidence lanes

instruction: Route a browser task through the repo dispatcher before browsing manually
action_sequence: inspect scripts/system/browser_chain_dispatcher.py
map the task to a site surface such as github.com or huggingface.co
choose playwriter as the execution engine when session reuse matters
preserve the routed surface as the canonical operator path

instruction: Capture deterministic evidence for a page-oriented operator task
action_sequence: use scripts/system/playwriter_lane_runner.py with a session id
navigate to the target URL
capture title evidence
capture snapshot evidence
write JSON artifacts under artifacts/page_evidence

instruction: Emit a cross-talk packet so another agent can pick up work without rereading the whole repo
action_sequence: run scripts/system/crosstalk_relay.py emit
include summary, proof paths, next action, and risk
write the packet to dated JSON
append the packet to the JSONL lane bus
mirror the packet into Cross Talk.md

instruction: Verify that a cross-talk packet landed on every lane
action_sequence: run scripts/system/crosstalk_relay.py verify with the packet id
check dated_json lane
check jsonl_bus lane
check obsidian lane
confirm fully_verified is true before treating the handoff as complete

instruction: Refresh stale Obsidian system notes from the real repo state
action_sequence: inventory the live Avalon vault notes
compare stale notes against current repo files and recent packets
rewrite targeted operator and architecture notes
create new dated sync notes when a broad state update happened
spot-check the written notes after saving

instruction: Record a legal milestone in the patent lane after receiving a USPTO receipt
action_sequence: read the existing patent note in the vault
update the main patent note with receipt fields
create a standalone receipt note with exact identifiers
link both notes into the internal tracker
mirror the update into cross-talk lanes

instruction: Turn a stale patent strategy note into a usable internal tracker
action_sequence: open the existing Patent Strategy note
replace vague milestone language with concrete tracking identifiers
store application number, confirmation number, Patent Center number, and payment timestamp
track the January 15 2027 priority target as the main calendar date
link the tracker to the patent note and receipt note

instruction: Add formal axiom coverage against the live reference math without confusing it with the legacy wall law
action_sequence: inspect docs/AXIOM_CROSS_REFERENCE.md and the current reference pipeline
identify which axioms belong to the bounded reference Layer 12 and which belong to legacy R^(d^2) modules
create a focused pytest file for the reference surfaces
cover breathing, spin coherence, hyperbolic metric axioms, golden ratio weighting, and bounded Layer 12 regression
document the split in the cross-reference note

instruction: Run a combined regression pass after adding new axiom coverage
action_sequence: run pytest on tests/industry_standard/test_formal_axioms_reference.py
run pytest on that file together with tests/industry_standard/test_theoretical_axioms.py
confirm all collected tests pass
treat the result as the proof for the handoff packet

instruction: Generate phone navigation telemetry from a saved emulator UI dump
action_sequence: use scripts/system/phone_navigation_telemetry.py against the saved XML dump
extract visible text, buttons, route clues, and scrollable elements
write the telemetry JSON artifact
use that artifact to reason about the device lane without needing live taps

instruction: Capture the assistant side of a browser and operator session as reusable training data
action_sequence: read the existing browser training JSONL to match its schema
summarize the actual operator actions taken during the session
write a companion JSONL file for Codex-side actions
validate that each line parses as JSON
leave the file in training-data/browser for the next model run
